## Summary

Describe the change and the BASIN surface it affects.

## Claim Boundary

- [ ] Evidence labels, scale labels, jurisdiction labels, and source custody are preserved.
- [ ] No hydraulic model-of-record, rights determination, engineering readiness, environmental clearance, project-selection, endorsement, ROI, or validation claim is introduced unless explicitly source-backed and reviewed.
- [ ] Any changed public claim has a traceable source path or is marked held/source-needed/confidence-limited.

## Validation

```powershell
git diff --check -- README.md CONTRIBUTING.md docs .github
```
